theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Reviews are all over the map on this one.

theatres.title: Moana
theatres.review: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…
theatres.fullReview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
theatres.take: The reviews refuse to agree on this one.

theatres.title: Supergirl
theatres.review: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

similar.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
Rebel Moon - Part One: A Child of Fire

theatres.fullReview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.
theatres.take: Critics are split, with the story drawing most complaints.

theatres.title: Minions & Monsters
theatres.review: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

similar.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness
Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants

theatres.fullReview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

castPics.name: Pierre Coffin
castPics.character: James / Henry / Ed / Dick / The Minions (voice)

theatres.hook: Premiered at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival.

theatres.title: Romería
theatres.review: With her mother's diary in hand, Marina's search for official documents for university leads her to her biological family on the Atlantic coast.
theatres.fullReview: With her mother's diary in hand, Marina's search for official documents for university leads her to her biological family on the Atlantic coast. What starts as an administrative quest reveals long-buried family secrets.
theatres.take: Word from reviewers is solidly good.
theatres.hook: Premiered at the Cannes Film Festival.

theatres.title: Young Washington
theatres.review: Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to…
theatres.fullReview: Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to trust and confront the leader he's becoming.
theatres.take: The reviews refuse to agree on this one.

theatres.title: The Invite
theatres.review: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.
theatres.fullReview: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.
theatres.take: Critics loved this one; reception has been close to universal acclaim.
theatres.hook: A remake of the Spanish film ‘The People Upstairs by Cesc Gay’.

ott.title: I'm Not Afraid
ott.review: 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.
ott.fullReview: 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.

ott.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain
ott.review: This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.
ott.fullReview: This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

ott.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
ott.review: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as…
ott.fullReview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.
ott.take: Opinions split right down the middle on this one.

ott.title: Salcedo, Leather, and Boogaloo
ott.review: Martín Salcedo is rarely swept off his feet — until Verónica Pinilla and Quiebra Canto turn up the party, booze and danger.
ott.fullReview: Martín Salcedo is rarely swept off his feet — until Verónica Pinilla and Quiebra Canto turn up the party, booze and danger.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

similar.title: The Man in the High Castle

ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!

ott.title: Oasis
ott.review: Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and…
ott.fullReview: Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and impenetrable security. The perfect place to spend the best summer of your life. But everything falls apart when the police storm the resort to investigate a mysterious disappearance. In such an exclusive place, everyone is a suspect — and no one can leave until the culprit is found.

ott.title: The Bear
ott.review: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…
ott.fullReview: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a rough-around-the-edges crew that ultimately reveal themselves as his chosen family.
ott.take: Reviewers were close to unanimous — this one landed.

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

comingSoon.title: The Odyssey
comingSoon.review: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.
comingSoon.fullReview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.

comingSoon.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
comingSoon.review: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction.
comingSoon.fullReview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: The End of Oak Street
comingSoon.review: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown,…
comingSoon.fullReview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

comingSoon.title: Resident Evil
comingSoon.review: Bryan, a medical courier, is in the process of making a delivery when a sudden outbreak occurs, forcing him to fight…
comingSoon.fullReview: Bryan, a medical courier, is in the process of making a delivery when a sudden outbreak occurs, forcing him to fight for survival.

comingSoon.title: Forgotten Island
comingSoon.review: While celebrating their last night together, high school graduates and best friends Jo and Raissa stumble upon a…

similar.title: Tinker Bell and the Lost Treasure
The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants

comingSoon.fullReview: While celebrating their last night together, high school graduates and best friends Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever.

comingSoon.title: Digger
comingSoon.review: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's savior before the disaster…
comingSoon.fullReview: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's savior before the disaster he's unleashed destroys everything.
